description: Source attribution for tokamax workloads. Shapes and operations derived from openxla/tokamax arg_specs.py.

source_repo.description: Tokamax: TPU kernel benchmarks from the OpenXLA project. Provides reference JAX implementations and Pallas kernels for common ML operations with production model configurations.

attention.description: Scaled dot-product attention with grouped query attention (GQA) and causal masking.

ragged_dot.description: Grouped matmul (ragged dot) for MoE expert computation. Each group performs independent matrix multiplication.

cross_entropy.description: Fused linear projection + log-softmax + cross-entropy loss. Combines the LM head matmul with loss computation.

gated_linear_unit.description: SwiGLU gated linear unit: SiLU(x @ W_gate) * (x @ W_up) @ W_down. Standard MLP in modern LLMs.

layer_norm.description: RMSNorm: x * rsqrt(mean(x^2) + eps) * scale. Used as the normalization layer in modern LLMs.

triangle_mult.description: AlphaFold triangle multiplicative update. Pairwise residue interactions via gated projections and contraction over shared residue index.
